title: Chopper Sees the Flag Threatened
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on chopper sees the flag threatened, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Chopper Sees the Flag Threatened. Back in the present, Wapol attacks Drum Castle and tries to turn Hiriluk’s symbol into another selfish possession. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And we townsfolk alone just aren't strong enough to beat them...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll resort to any method possible... even if it means sacrificing myself, I'll do it...!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Get on and I'll take you up there!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: All the way to the castle!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How dare you do that to Doc's flag...'

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: hurry up and kill these pathetic worms.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Doc tried to save even you before he died!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't hate humans... this country and its people are all sick right now.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why!? Why doctor!? How could you think a person:as disposable as[this man is worth saving...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But you better get out of this country this instant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What kinda crap are you spoutin', Chopper!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Do you really think he can be reasoned with!?

summary: This part highlights chopper sees the flag threatened and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
